title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 30.840 - Renewal
text:
30.840.  Renewal. — The state treasurer may renew a linked deposit for an eligible guaranteed agribusiness, an eligible guaranteed livestock operation, or an eligible guaranteed vermiculture operation for additional, up to five-year, terms, not to exceed ten years.
(L. 1997 H.B. 557, A.L. 2005 S.B. 270, A.L. 2006 H.B. 1739)
